title: cheilanthes bhutanica
intro: Cheilanthes bhutanica, also known as the Bhutan spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and ability to thrive in high-altitude regions. The medicinal properties of Cheilanthes bhutanica are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce inflammation in the body. Cheilanthes bhutanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
